notes:
Expanded and trimmed locally 2026-05-18 after Lior approval: official RSS sources added for Maariv, TheMarker, expanded Globes, and N12/mako; culture trimmed to a lean default set. RSS is pulled by us; no HTML scraping. Aggregator feeds are tracked as fallback candidates only, not active by default.
2026-05-18 local: added international RSS sources for BBC World and Sky News World; CNN uses Google News RSS fallback because official CNN RSS feeds tested stale/old. Also refined topic taxonomy from broad בארץ/עולם buckets into פוליטיקה/ביטחון/משפט/פלילים etc.
2026-05-19 local: added official Home Front Command Telegram channel as a FAST security source because no official RSS feed is available.
2026-05-19 local: added official IDF Spokesperson Telegram channel as a FAST security source.
2026-05-19 local: removed Home Front Command Telegram source after Lior clarified the intended source was IDF Spokesperson Telegram only.
2026-05-19 local: added official Israel Police spokesperson Telegram channel as a FAST source for crime/security/public-safety updates.
2026-05-20 local: Lior clarified foreign sources should contribute only Israel/Middle East-relevant stories. Added stronger foreign RSS/fallback sources (NYT Middle East, Guardian Middle East, Reuters/AP/Axios/Politico/Bloomberg filtered Google News, Al Jazeera all-feed with relevance filter) and tightened English-source filtering.
2026-05-21 local: added a dedicated רכילות domain/category with validated RSS feeds from וואלה סלבס, mako סלבס, and TMI/מעריב. Pplus/ynet has no usable RSS found; one malformed TMI feed and weak aggregator feeds remain excluded/fallback only.
2026-05-21 release request: Lior approved adding all gossip sources including Pplus and TMI and publishing. Pplus is active through a Google News RSS query scoped to pplus.ynet.co.il because direct Pplus pages/RSS are blocked or unavailable; TMI malformed XML is recovered in update_feed.py.
2026-05-24 local: per Lior, add only official RSS for now and no Google News fallback for the new requested sources. Added official Jerusalem Post Israel/Middle East/Iran RSS feeds; left Makor Rishon excluded until a direct official RSS XML endpoint is found.
2026-05-24 local: classify Jerusalem Post as an Israeli/local source (בארץ) despite English language.
2026-05-26 approved by Lior: broad general N12 - חדשות feed disabled because it can inject off-domain/category-noise items; keep precise N12 section feeds active and preserve N12 visible label for mako/rcs.mako infrastructure.
2026-05-27 local: after Lior approval, added first safe RSS pilot sources ICE, Zavit, JNS, France24 Middle East, The Media Line, and מדע גדול בקטנה; refined Pplus Google News query to direct site-scoped 7-day feed. Kan/Calcalist/Bizportal/Davar direct RSS remain excluded because tested blocked/broken.
2026-05-27 local: added Srugim/סרוגים official WordPress RSS after live validation (12 recent items).
2026-05-28 approved pilot: added right-leaning/religious active sources (INN/ערוץ 7 Hebrew, Israel National News EN, כיפה, בשבע, מקור ראשון Google News) and cleaned ערוץ 14 Google fallback to c14.co.il with stricter noise filtering; pilot must stay under normal QA/dedupe gates.
2026-06-11 local: added two Shvilim RSS sources (general 4X4/off-road and driving tips) under existing רכב category as BE-only source addition; future queue tracks creating a dedicated 4x4 domain and moving these sources there.

active.name: The Jerusalem Post - Middle East

active.name: The Jerusalem Post - Iran

Removed from active by TT RR on 2026-06-10 after Lior reported Google News fallback sources returned to the user-facing source list.

fallback_candidates.notes: Approved for tracking only, not active by default. Use only if official RSS is unavailable and after quality review/dedupe cleanup.

sync_policy_proposal_2026_05_18.notes: Each sync should rescan sources and rebuild a fresh state picture rather than append noise. Keep historical dedupe, source/topic quotas, and approval-first publishing until quality is stable.
